label: Chats

offline.title: No internet connection
offline.subtitle: Check your connection and try again.

limit.title: Not enough AI Credits
limit.body: You have {{balance}} of {{allocation}} AI Credits available. Next refresh: {{renewalDate}}.
limit.photoRequired: You need at least {{cost}} AI Credits to analyze a photo.

empty.title: Start a conversation
empty.subtitle: Ask about your meals, macros, or what to improve today.
empty.v1: Summarize my meals today and give 3 concrete improvements.
empty.v2: What are the biggest gaps in my diet based on my recent meals?
empty.v3: Suggest a high-protein dinner idea tailored to me.
empty.v4: How much protein did I eat today based on my logged meals?

history.emptyDescription: Start a new chat to see your conversation history here.
history.offlineEmpty: No local chat history. Connect to the internet to load chats.
history.refreshError: Pull to refresh when your connection is stable.

deadLetterSubtitle: Your messages are saved locally. Retry to sync them now.

errors.fetchFailed: Could not fetch a response. Please try again.
errors.offTopic: I can only answer questions related to nutrition and diet.
errors.offline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please retry.
errors.serviceUnavailable: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.authRequired: Please sign in again to continue.
errors.emptyResponse: I couldn't generate a useful response. Please try again.

paywall.autorenew: Payment will be charged to your account. Subscription auto-renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
